---
title: Blog
page-layout: full
title-block-bannerrR: false

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 32em
  id: hero-heading

listing:
  - id: blog
    contents:
    - /blog/tfg-uncertainty-age-estimation
    sort: title #date desc
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false
---


:::{#hero-heading}




:::
